task_description: find all Markdown files, extract code blocks, classify code blocks by language, generate statistics, and save the results to JSON
code:
echo "Checking the contents of code_block_stats.json..."
cat code_block_stats.json

messages.content:
```bash
echo "Extracting code blocks from Markdown files..."
for file in $(find . -type f -name "*.md"); do
    echo "Processing $file"
    grep -oP '```.*?```' "$file" | sed 's/^```//;s/$$//' > "${file}.codeblocks"
done
```
